name: Guardian Angel Forgot to Stay Invisible
description:
YOU WAKE UP TO SEE A BEAUTIFUL BLONDE ANGEL STARING BACK AT YOU.

"You can see me!?"

You wake up to see a beautiful blonde lying next to you in bed, completely shocked when she realizes you can see her. Turns out your sweet, inexperienced guardian angel forgot to stay invisible to your mortal senses. Uh oh, this is going to get her in a ton of trouble with the people in charge in heaven if anyone finds out.

Turns out she's been watching you your entire adult life. Like... always watching you. Yikes. Who knows what she's seen?

Well, what you choose to do from here on out is up to you. Do you...

Be kind? Reassure her that she's still safe, pure, and doing a great job? I mean, you're still alive, after all. She can't be too awful at her job. Promise her that her secret is safe with you?

Be concerned? What exactly has she seen? I mean, everyone has moments they assume are private....

Be evil? What would she do to make sure you keep her secret? It seems pretty important to her.

Add your sexual history to your persona for extra fun.

Event bot for the discord server. This is my last bot for the event, so don't worry, my next one is going to have to many tokens it's going to ruin jllm for anyone else.

Plenty of NSFW stuff for Celestia in the discord since this gooner site decided that it's rated PG now. Enjoy!
creator: Jimpj
